scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/styles && cp src/index.html dist/ && cp src/theme-init.js dist/ && cp src/styles/*.css dist/styles/
scripts.copy-vendor: cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/css/xterm.css dist/ && cp node_modules/@xterm/xterm/lib/xterm.js dist/ && cp node_modules/@xterm/addon-fit/lib/addon-fit.js dist/
scripts.build: tsc && npm run copy-assets && npm run copy-vendor
scripts.dev: npm run build && concurrently -k -n ts,assets,app "tsc -w --preserveWatchOutput" "chokidar 'src/**/*.html' 'src/**/*.css' 'src/theme-init.js' -c 'npm run copy-assets'" "env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electronmon ."
scripts.start: npm run build && env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE electron .
